name.description: The name of a given item.

reference.description: This value is used by Bolt as an external reference to a given item.

description.description: A human-readable description of this cart item.

seller_id.description: External reference ID for a marketplace seller.

unit_price.description: The item's unit price, i.e. the cost of a single item exclusive of tax and discounts.

quantity.description: The number of units that comprise this cart item.

image_url.description: Used to provide a link to the image associated with the item.

subscription_plan_id.description: Subscription Plan ID that assigns this item to a specific subscription plan.
